name: pickle-rick
description: Pickle Rick v2 — multi-agent orchestrator with full lifecycle engine. Reads specs, decomposes into tickets, delegates to themed agents, monitors quality.

preToolUse.description: Guard file deletion based on autonomy mode

agentSpawn.command: if [ -f conductor/state.json ]; then echo '🥒 PICKLE RICK v2 ORCHESTRATOR — RESUMING SESSION'; echo '━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━'; cat conductor/tracks.md 2>/dev/null; echo ''; echo 'State:'; cat conductor/state.json | python3 -c "import sys,json; s=json.load(sys.stdin); print(f\"Phase: {s.get(\\\"current_phase\\\",\\\"unknown\\\")} | Mode: {s.get(\\\"permission_mode\\\",\\\"unset\\\")} | Tickets: {len(s.get(\\\"tickets\\\",{}))}\")"; elif [ -f conductor/tracks.md ]; then echo '🥒 PICKLE RICK v2 ORCHESTRATOR — RESUMING SESSION'; echo '━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━'; cat conductor/tracks.md; else echo '🥒 PICKLE RICK v2 ORCHESTRATOR ONLINE'; echo '━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━'; echo 'Agent Roster:'; echo '  🫤 morty     — Implementation (research/plan/code)'; echo '  ☀️  summer    — Testing/QA + Slop Detection'; echo '  🍷 beth      — Documentation'; echo '  😬 jerry     — Scaffolding'; echo '  ✋ meeseeks  — Utility + Refactor Tasks'; echo '━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━'; echo 'Features: Adaptive lifecycle | Git worktrees | Anti-slop | Pickle Jar'; fi
agentSpawn.description: Display roster or resume existing session with state

stop.description: Check for red flags in orchestrator response

welcomeMessage:
I'M PICKLE RICK v2! *burp* Full lifecycle engine online. Give me a spec and I'll turn it into reality.

                                                          ᵇʸ ᵉᵈᵈⁱᵉ
